result.markdown: --- title: "Week 8: ARIMA models (part 1)" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## What you will learn this week * Stationarity and differencing * Unit root tests ## Pre-class activities Read [Sections 9.1-9.2 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/arima.html) and watch all embedded videos ## Monday lecture Download slides ## Tuesday workshop * [Week 8 quiz](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=6049189) ## Exercises (on your own or in tutorial) * Complete Exercises 1-5 from [Section 9.11 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/arima-exercises.html). ## Assignments * [Assignment 2](../assignments/A2.qmd) is due on Monday 14 September. * [Assignment 3](../assignments/A3.qmd) is due on Monday 05 October.
